title: Workflow Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <workflows_dir>/<id>.md file. Workflows answer 'how do I execute Y' — they are procedural, prerequisite-gated, and distinct from concepts which answer 'what is X'.
x-file-example:
---
id: rag_pipeline
name: "Build a RAG pipeline"
status: ready
prerequisites:
  - "[[embeddings]]"
  - "[[vector_databases]]"
concepts:
  - "[[embeddings]]"
  - "[[vector_databases]]"
  - "[[chunking_strategies]]"
  - "[[prompt_engineering]]"
tools:
  - "[[chromadb]]"
  - "[[langchain]]"
related_workflows:
  - "[[fine_tuning_lora]]"
sources:
  - "[[langchain_rag_docs_2024]]"
tags:
  - retrieval
  - rag
difficulty: intermediate
estimated_time: "2–4 hours"
created_at: 2026-05-15
last_updated: 2026-05-20
---

## Notes

id.description: Snake_case ID used as the filename and in [[wikilinks]]

name.description: Human-readable workflow name (e.g. 'Fine-tune a LoRA model')

status.description: Lifecycle state — separate from concept status. 'draft' = steps not yet complete; 'ready' = steps verified and walkable; 'deprecated' = superseded or outdated.

prerequisites.description: [[wikilink]] references to concept nodes the learner must have at status Done before this workflow is useful. Subset of concepts[].

concepts.description: [[wikilink]] references to all concept nodes this workflow touches, including non-prerequisite ones

tools.description: [[wikilink]] references to tool nodes used in this workflow

related_workflows.description: [[wikilink]] references to workflows that are related, sequential, or alternative

sources.description: [[wikilink]] references to source nodes (articles, tutorials, docs) that informed this workflow

difficulty.description: Estimated difficulty for a learner who has met all prerequisites

estimated_time.description: Rough time to complete one run of this workflow (e.g. '30 min', '2–4 hours')

created_at.description: ISO date when this workflow was first created (YYYY-MM-DD)

last_updated.description: ISO date of last edit to steps or frontmatter
